title: Side Quests List — Africa / Brazil Carnival / Antarctica / Patagonia (2025)
html:
Side Quests List — Africa / Brazil Carnival / Antarctica / Patagonia (2025)

Source: 2025-05-20 Apple Note. 5-item bucket-list of remaining adventure side-quests post-Asia chapter.

TL;DR

  • Ride a train across Africa.
  • Live amongst African villages.
  • Party at Carnival in Brazil.
  • Go to Antarctica.
  • Visit Patagonia with Huck.
  • Pattern: post-China-chapter, Yahir's adventure-vector swings toward continents he hasn't touched (Africa, S. America, Antarctica). The "with Huck" qualifier on Patagonia signals trip-buddy as part of the side-quest definition, not just destination.
  • This is the explicit articulation of the six month adventure creed — naming side-quests as a category, then enumerating.
  • Same era as the Brotein grind (the mega notebook period), suggesting Yahir holds founder mode and adventure mode in parallel as life-architectures.

Connections

  • six month adventure creed
  • non negotiables for traveling
  • huck
  • brazil
  • 2025 09 08 naviwell charting workflow — same era, opposite mode (Austin grinding)
